nodes.name: Scrape Homepage
nodes.notes: Fetches the homepage HTML. For JS-heavy sites, replace this with a Browserless node.

nodes.name: Fetch Brand Catalog
nodes.notes: Fetches your current brand catalog from Airtable for overlap analysis. Replace with your actual Airtable credentials.

nodes.name: AI Qualification (Claude)
nodes.notes: Calls Claude API for lead qualification. Uses the qualification prompt structure. Replace with n8n AI node if preferred.

nodes.name: Store in Airtable
nodes.notes: Stores the qualified lead in Airtable. Creates a new record in the Leads table.

nodes.name: Trigger Contact Finder
nodes.notes: If score >= 6, triggers the contact discovery workflow

string.name: message
string.value: =Lead scored {{ $json.lead_score }}/10 — below threshold for automatic contact discovery. Review manually if desired.
